summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares Floating Rate Bond ETF (FLOT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of USD-denominated, investment-grade floating rate notes with maturities of 0-5 years. FLOT was launched on Jun 14, 2011 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg US Floating Rate Notes (<5 Y)

data.title: Building Resilient Portfolios: ETF Approaches to Potential Rate Hikes
data.text: While the Federal Reserve left interest rates unchanged at the latest meeting, investors increasingly speculate that rate hikes are on the table in 2026.

data.title: These Bond ETFs Could Keep Winning if Rates Stay Higher for Longer
data.text: Funds tied to floating-rate debt could continue to outperform if inflation keeps bond yields elevated and delays Fed rate cuts.

data.title: Best Bonds For Income
data.text: For many, social security isn't enough to fund their retirement needs. Bonds can help produce another income stream.

data.title: The Tell: Here are the ETFs to buy on persistently higher inflation in 2022 and beyond, says BlackRock's head of iShares strategy
data.text: Given an outlook for high U.S. inflation that's likely to persist beyond 2022, Gargi Chaudhuri of BlackRock Inc., the world's biggest asset manager, says investors should continue to hedge their portf...

data.title: 7 Best ETFs for Rising Interest Rates
data.text: Investors have plenty of tools to combat higher bond yields. Here are seven of the best ETFs to head off interest-rate risk.

data.title: 7 Bond Funds to Anchor Your Retirement Portfolio
data.text: Retirement savers need to weigh interest-rate and inflation risks when structuring their investments. These seven bond funds help them do just that.

data.title: The 7 Best, And Worst, Bonds To Buy Right Now
data.text: It’s best to avoid bonds when your central bank is printing money like crazy.
